message:
fix(layout,render-svg): prevent legend clamp panic and make quadrant chart adaptive

Pie chart legend_width calculation could panic if chart_legend_max_width was
less than chart_legend_min_width (clamp requires min <= max). Now ensures
legend_max >= legend_min before clamping.

Quadrant chart SVG renderer was using hardcoded 400x400 dimensions and fixed
margins. Now derives chart_w/chart_h from layout bounds with minimum 200px
floor, and centers the chart horizontally within the available width, producing
adaptive layouts that scale with the diagram content.

- crates/fm-layout/src/lib.rs: guard legend clamp bounds
- crates/fm-render-svg/src/lib.rs: adaptive quadrant chart dimensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
